scripts.demo:check: npm run typecheck:demo && npm run demo:coverage && npm run demo:build && npm run build && npm run demo:build:dist
scripts.build: npm run clean && rollup --bundleConfigAsCjs -c rollup.config.mjs --environment MODE:prod && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --declarationDir dist/types && npm run build:styles
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.verify:code: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:tests && npm run typecheck:demo && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run demo:build && npm run test:code && npm run demo:build:dist && npm run test:browser && npm run test:package
scripts.docs:dev: npm run build && npm run api:sync && npm run dev --workspace=ol-doc
scripts.docs:build: npm run build && npm run api:sync && npm run api:check && npm run build --workspace=ol-doc
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run api:sync && vitest run
scripts.test:docs:browser: npm run docs:build && playwright test --config playwright.docs.config.ts
scripts.test:code: npm run build && vitest run --config vitest.code.config.ts
scripts.test:package: npm run build && vitest run test/PackageExports.test.ts && node scripts/package/assert-package-contract.mjs && node scripts/package/test-offline-install.mjs
scripts.test:watch: npm run build && npm run api:sync && vitest
